ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Regina Leoni appeared via zoom for and with Dena Gaherty (petitioner).
Tyuen Tran appeared in person (pro per).

Counsel stated that she would accept service on behalf of Kelly Gaherty, and that they are willing to go to mediation prior to requesting an evidentiary hearing.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 13, 2026. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 16, 2026. The matter is continued to July 22, 2026 and the Parties are to return on July 22, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
